features: If you experience bleeding gums when brushing, this may be a sign that you may have gum problems
It has a unique patented shield plate technology developed to help prevent gum problems
Chlorhexidine synthesis helps prevent plaque build-up along the gum line, while gum strengthening ingredients help tighten and rejuvenate sensitive gum tissue
description: Product Description If you experience bleeding gums when brushing, this may be a sign that you may have Gum problems.Treat them with this toothpaste.It has a unique patented shield plate technology developed to help prevent gum problems.Chlorhexidine synthesis helps prevent plaque build-up along the gum line, while Gum strengthening ingredients help tighten and rejuvenate sensitive gum tissue. Ingredients Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, PEG-8, Aluminum Lactate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Aroma, Limonene, Eugenol, Zinc Citrate, Sodium Hyaluronate, PVP, Sodium Saccharin, Taurine, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Sodium Benzoate, Chlorhexidine Digluconate, Titanium Dioxide, CI 12490, CI 77492, Contains: 1.1% Sodium Monofluorophosphate 1450 ppm F- Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush. Brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, focusing on all surfaces of the teeth. Rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. Manufacturer Contact Information Wisdom Toothbrushes Ltd., Haverhill, England, CB9 8DT. See more
